name: PCI DSS v4.0.1 Assessment
description: Assessment aligned to PCI DSS v4.0.1 requirements

sections.name: Build and Maintain a Secure Network and Systems
sections.description: Build and Maintain a Secure Network and Systems controls and practices.

questions.text: Are firewall and router rules reviewed at least every six months?

guidance.title: Are firewall and router rules reviewed at least every six months?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are vendor default passwords removed before systems go into production?

guidance.title: Are vendor default passwords removed before systems go into production?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Is network architecture for cardholder data environment documented and current?

guidance.title: Is network architecture for cardholder data environment documented and current?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are configuration standards applied to in-scope systems?

guidance.title: Are configuration standards applied to in-scope systems?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

sections.name: Protect Account Data
sections.description: Protect Account Data controls and practices.

questions.text: Is PAN masked when displayed unless there is a valid business need?

guidance.title: Is PAN masked when displayed unless there is a valid business need?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Is stored account data encrypted using strong cryptography?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are cryptographic keys managed with documented lifecycle controls?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Is transmission of account data over open networks encrypted?

guidance.title: Is transmission of account data over open networks encrypted?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are anti-malware controls deployed and actively managed on in-scope systems?

guidance.title: Are anti-malware controls deployed and actively managed on in-scope systems?
guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are security patches applied within defined PCI timelines?

guidance.risk: If this is not in place, control reliability and compliance evidence may be weak.
actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are internal and external vulnerability scans performed and remediated?

guidance.title: Are internal and external vulnerability scans performed and remediated?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are penetration tests conducted for the cardholder data environment?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Is access to cardholder data restricted by role and business need?

actions: Define, implement, and evidence this control.

questions.text: Are unique IDs used for all users with access to in-scope systems?

questions.text: Is MFA enforced for administrative access and remote access?

questions.text: Are dormant or terminated user accounts disabled promptly?
